passive.name: Momentum
passive.description: +1 permanent dmg buff per basic RPS win (SLASH/COUNTER only). Cap at +5. Resets on any draw or loss. Persists across battles within a run.

ultimate.name: Blade Rush
ultimate.description: Deal 25 dmg, ignore RPS outcome, ignore monster GUARD intent reduction.

ultimate.name: Foresight
ultimate.description: Skip current turn (deal 0 dmg, monster acts free), reveal next 2 turns of monster intent at 100% honesty.

unlock.description: Win 1 battle with 4+ total COUNTER wins.

passive.name: Crit Strike
passive.description: 10% chance on SLASH/COUNTER wins to deal x2 damage.

ultimate.name: Berserk
ultimate.description: For 2 turns: deal +100% dmg AND take +50% dmg from monster.

unlock.description: Deal 30+ dmg in a single turn (any run).

passive.name: Arcane Recovery
passive.description: +1 HP per basic RPS win (SLASH/GUARD/COUNTER wins only). No cap.

ultimate.name: Purify
ultimate.description: Heal 15 HP and restore 40 energy. Enables cycle-ult mage rotation.

unlock.description: Use Ultimate 3 times in a single battle.
